zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Wilcox於大約1618年出生在英國時，她的父親John Wilcox Sr.30歲，母親Mary26歲。她於1640年與John Bidwell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年1月15日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Wilcox于大约1618年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Wilcox Sr.30岁，母亲Mary26岁。她于1640年与John Bidwell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年1月15日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Wilcox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Flintshire): variant of Wilcock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is based on the pronunciation.

variants.name: Wilcock
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: Willcox
meanings: English: variant of   Wilcox  , widespread in southwestern England.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Wilcox was born about 1618, in England, her father, John Wilcox Sr., was 30 and her mother, Mary, was 26. She married John Bidwell in 1640, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 15 January 1690, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Wilcox(이)가 대략 1618년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wilcox Sr.(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 John Bidwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 1월 15일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Bidwell em 1640, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Wilcox родилась около 1618 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Wilcox Sr. было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bidwell в 1640 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 15 январь 1690 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Wilcox nació aproximadamente 1618, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Wilcox Sr., tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Bidwell en 1640, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 15 de enero de 1690, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
